pr_text:
## Title: Fix implicit double-to-uint32_t cast in PUCCH group sequence hopping

### Summary
Remove unnecessary `floor()` calls in `nr_group_sequence_hopping()` that caused implicit type casting from double to uint32_t. The function calculates initialization values for PUCCH group hopping using integer division on a uint32_t parameter, but was wrapping the division with `floor()`, which returns a double. Since integer division of unsigned integers already truncates toward zero, the `floor()` call
